raw_response_text:
<features>
- bright pink/magenta petals
- star-shaped flower structure
- prominent white/light-colored center with many stamens
- multiple petals (around 6 visible)
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has star-shaped petals and a prominent white/light center with many stamens] THEN [81]
- IF [flower is yellow with large, drooping petals] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a star-shaped flower with bright pink petals and a prominent light-colored center, which matches the pattern seen in class 81.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>
